record_types.name: CLK_ADC_CTRL_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_4
fields.description: Selects the auxiliary clock source, will glitch when switching

fields.name: Reserved_8_9
fields.description:
Asynchronously kills the clock generator, enable must be set low
before deasserting kill

fields.name: KILL
fields.description: Starts and stops the clock generator cleanly

fields.name: Reserved_12_15
fields.description:
This delays the enable signal by up to 3 cycles of the input clock
This must be set before the clock is enabled to have any effect

fields.name: Reserved_18_19
fields.description:
An edge on this signal shifts the phase of the output by 1 cycle of
the input clock This can be done at any time

record_types.name: CLK_ADC_DIV_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_15
fields.description: Integer part of clock divisor, 0 -> max+1, can be changed on-the-fly

record_types.name: CLK_ADC_SELECTED_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_4
fields.description: Selects the auxiliary clock source, will glitch when switching

fields.name: Reserved_9_9
fields.description:
Asynchronously kills the clock generator, enable must be set low
before deasserting kill

fields.name: KILL

fields.name: ENABLE
fields.description:
Enables duty cycle correction for odd divisors, can be changed
on-the-fly

fields.description:

This must be set before the clock is enabled to have any effect

the input clock This can be done at any time

fields.name: FC0_REF_KHZ
fields.description:
Minimum pass frequency in kHz. This is optional. Set to 0 if you are
not using the pass/fail flags

fields.name: FC0_MIN_KHZ
fields.description:
Maximum pass frequency in kHz. This is optional. Set to 0x1ffffff if
you are not using the pass/fail flags

fields.name: FC0_MAX_KHZ
fields.description:
Delays the start of frequency counting to allow the mux to settle
Delay is measured in multiples of the reference clock period

fields.name: FC0_DELAY
fields.description:
The test interval is 0.98us * 2**interval, but let's call it 1us *
2**interval The default gives a test interval of 250us

fields.name: FC0_INTERVAL
fields.description:
Clock sent to frequency counter, set to 0 when not required Writing
to this register initiates the frequency count

fields.name: FC0_STATUS
fields.description: Result of frequency measurement, only valid when status_done=1

fields.name: SLEEP_EN1
fields.description: indicates the state of the clock enable

fields.name: ENABLED0
fields.description: indicates the state of the clock enable

fields.name: Reserved_9_11
fields.description: Read-only. Waiting for test clock to start

fields.name: Reserved_17_19
fields.description:
Read-only. Test clock slower than expected, only valid when
status_done=1

fields.name: Reserved_21_23
fields.description:
Read-only. Test clock faster than expected, only valid when
status_done=1

fields.name: Reserved_25_27
fields.description: Read-only. Test clock stopped during test
